leadText: Tera Shift (Japanese: テラスチェンジ Tera Change) is an Ability introduced during Generation IX, in The Indigo Disk. It is one of the signature Abilities of Terapagos.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When Terapagos enters the battle, it turns into its Terastal Form until the end of the battle. Tera Shift cannot be copied by Trace , Power of Alchemy , or Receiver . Tera Shift cannot be replaced by Lingering Aroma , or suppressed by Neutralizing Gas . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] In Auto Battles , Terapagos will first change into its Terastal Form before attacking the wild Pokémon.
